title: Malty Juicy Egyptian Tofu Kebabs
description: A plant-based Egyptian dish featuring malt vinegar and double-fry KFC method, perfect for a sick day with its bitter and juicy flavors.

ingredients.name: extra firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into 1 inch cubes

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, cornstarch, paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the tofu cubes to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the flour mixture.
Heat 1/4 cup of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and fry the tofu until golden brown on all sides.
Remove the fried tofu from the skillet and place it on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1/4 cup of vegetable oil and fry the tofu again until crispy and golden brown.
In a small bowl, whisk together malt vinegar and lemon juice.
Add the fried tofu to the bowl and toss to coat with the malt vinegar mixture.
Thread the tofu cubes onto skewers, if desired, and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
